quoteFirst: The signal instantly made by the _Hannibal_, "Have collided with the _Prince George_," was received on board the flagship at
quoteLast: During the next half-hour the masthead flashing lamps winked their messages back and forth; and at 10.10 the _Prince George_ signalled that there was a large hole in her gun-room, and that the submerged flat, cockpit and steering compartment were full of water.
title: The Memoirs of Admiral Lord Beresford
author: Beresford, Charles William De la Poer Beresford, Baron, 1846-1919
